author: nflaig
content: tried various approaches but there doesn't seem a way to solve the issue you raised without using the `head`, so using `parent_root` doesn't work, I refactored https://github.com/potuz/consensus-specs/pull/20, it should be 1:1 same as your PR, but requires the caller to pass the `head` instead so we can avoid inlining the `process_slots` logic, I guess either way would be fine

author: potuz
content: so I assume you do not like the call to head within the function to avoid the process slots call there? and just assume that the passed state is compatible?

author: potuz
content: your PR is fine as far as I can see is equivalent modulo lifting compatibility conditions to the caller, this is fine by me if you prefer this one so I'm merging it

author: nflaig
content: yes, that's what the note says, that's how it works at least in lodestar too

author: nflaig
content: just need to esnure the head matches the state

author: nflaig
content: either approach should be fine, we can also use your initial approach in the PR, I just don't like changing the function signature taht much if we don't need to, and previously (since bellatrix) it was always on the caller side to resolve the right state

author: potuz
content: that's fine I also disliked the call to process slots within that function

author: potuz
content: I will need to rebase the payload reorg PR eventually, but I think your PR is fine there

content: https://github.com/potuz/consensus-specs/pull/22 had to open that on Potuz's repo again because it's relies on #5236, if we do container changes anyways this is something we should consider, personally don't care too much but after the confusion of what gas limit is what, this could help with that cc <@592004585506340885>
